channel.title: Apple on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Apple on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: Apple's Co-Founder Says He's 'Not a Fan of AI' — What's He Really Disappointed About?
item.description: On Apple’s 50th anniversary, co-founder Steve Wozniak told CNN and BBC he’s been ‘disappointed a lot’ by AI. His criticisms cut deeper than you’d expect.

item.title: The Biggest Irony Since Steve Jobs Left: Apple Now Needs Google
item.description: Apple is paying Google $1 billion a year for Gemini to power Siri — the same Siri that once mocked Google Assistant
